name: Nachos
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F.
In a 9-inch baking dish, spread an even layer of chips. Pour the cheese sauce and beans evenly over the chips. Sprinkle with jalapenos, olives, onions, and tomatoes. Top with cheese.
Bake for 5 minutes or until the cheese melts. Garnish with scallions. Serve with sour cream, guacamole, and salsa.
